content: Hey I need help with a bug.
Hi! Welcome to Tasklet support. I'm happy to help. Can you describe what you're running into?
Sure. When I try to use the web browser feature, it just shows a blank screen. Nothing loads.
Got it, that sounds like a bug with the built-in browser. Let me classify this properly.
Actually, before we get into that — how much does the higher plan cost? I'm thinking of upgrading.

Sure! Our Premier plan is $49 per month and our Max plan is $99 per month. Both include the built-in browser. Happy to share more details if you'd like, but I also want to make sure we fix your current issue.
Okay that's helpful. Let's go back to the bug.
Perfect. Can I get your account email and the browser or OS you're using when you see the blank screen?
It's jordan@example.com. I'm using Chrome on macOS.
Thank you. And are there any error messages in the browser console, or is it completely blank with no output?
Completely blank. No errors I can see.
Understood. I'll file a bug report for this. Our engineering team will investigate the blank screen issue on Chrome macOS and follow up with you at jordan@example.com within 24 hours.
You're welcome! Is there anything else I can help you with today?
Great. Have a wonderful day and don't hesitate to reach out if anything comes up!
